zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith是Watson of Rothes和Mrs. Watson of Rothes的女兒，於1250年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。她和Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1320年在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾奧列文享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith是Watson of Rothes和Mrs. Watson of Rothes的女儿，于1250年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。她和Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1320年在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾奧列文享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Leith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the port near Edinburgh, which takes its name from the river at whose mouth it stands. The river name is of Celtic origin, meaning ‘dripping (water)’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith was born in 1250, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Watson of Rothes and Mrs. Watson of Rothes. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk. She died in 1320, in Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith est née en 1250, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Watson of Rothes et Mrs. Watson of Rothes. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk. Elle est décédée en 1320, à Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith wurde 1250 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Watson of Rothes und Mrs. Watson of Rothes geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1320 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith è nata il nel 1250 nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Watson of Rothes e Mrs. Watson of Rothes. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk. Morì nel 1320, nel Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leithは1250年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでWatson of RothesとMrs. Watson of Rothesの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Norman Leslie Of That Ilkとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1320年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアウチレベンで70歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith(은)는 1250년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 Watson of Rothes(와)과 Mrs. Watson of Rothes의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 오클레븐에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith nasceu em 1250, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Watson of Rothes e Mrs. Watson of Rothes. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk. Ela faleceu em 1320, em Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith родилась в 1250 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Watson of Rothes и Mrs. Watson of Rothes. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk. Она умерла в 1320 г. в местности аучливен, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Leith nació en 1250, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de Watson of Rothes y Mrs. Watson of Rothes. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir Norman Leslie Of That Ilk. Murió en 1320, en Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
